disable-mod.name: Disable Mod
disable-mod.description: Disables the mod without having to restart the game.

ignore-solids.name: Ignore Solids
ignore-solids.description: If enabled, ignores solid objects (blocks, slabs, etc.)

ignore-hazards.name: Ignore Hazards
ignore-hazards.description: If enabled, ignores hazard objects (spikes, saws, etc.)

name: Negative Hitboxes
description: But is it possible with negative hitboxes?
